cleavage agent: Database searches were performed with trypsin digestion specificity.
collision energy: fragmented with higher-energy collisional dissociation (HCD) with an NCE of 32.
instrument: All analyses were performed by a Q Exactive mass spectrometer
ionization type: measured by matrix-assisted laser desorption ionization time-of-flight mass spectrometry (5800 MALDI-TOF/TOF)
labeling: the protein quantification method, TMT6-plex was selected.
